name: Frame Layout Intent
summary: A primitive layout region-role (#1680 taxonomy): composition-intent = crop content to a fixed aspect ratio. Identity is the arrangement, not the CSS — FUI ships one block per role and the mechanism (aspect-ratio + object-fit) is an impl seam. Project-less; per-project styling rides presentational variants + plateau assembler presets.

ratio.description: The aspect ratio the content is cropped to. Open-numbered; the listed values are the recommended core.

fit.description: How the media fills the frame: cover (fill, crop overflow) or contain (letterbox, no crop). Default cover.

description:
What This Is

Crops its content to a fixed aspect ratio, centering and covering/containing the media within — video embeds, thumbnails, hero images, map tiles.

Composition-intent (the identity)

A primitive layout region-role (layoutTier: region-role), one of the per-role taxonomy ratified in #1680. Its identity is the composition-intent — crop content to a fixed aspect ratio — impl-agnostic. FUI ships exactly one block for this role; the CSS mechanism (aspect-ratio + object-fit) is an impl seam, never the role's identity (platform-decisions.md#layout-role-composition-intent).

Dimensions (UX-only)

  • ratio: The aspect ratio the content is cropped to. Open-numbered; the listed values are the recommended core (16:9 · 4:3 · 1:1 · 3:2 · 21:9).
  • fit: How the media fills the frame: cover (fill, crop overflow) or contain (letterbox, no crop). Default cover (cover · contain).
